design: Stage 1 (temperature=0): seed 1234 twice + seed 4321 once. All three byte-identical -> greedy decoding masks any seed effect; inconclusive. Stage 3 (confound closure, temperature=0.7): seed 4321 once -> diverges => identity in stage 2 is the seed's doing, not server-side full determinism or caching.
